returns.excludedArtifacts_: The list of excluded artifact identifiers.

returns.excludedContracts_: The list of excluded contract addresses.

returns.excludedSelectors_: The list of excluded selector configurations.

returns.excludedSenders_: The list of excluded sender addresses.

returns._0: True if any assertion has failed, false otherwise.

returns.targetedArtifactSelectors_: The list of targeted artifact-selector configurations.

returns.targetedArtifacts_: The list of targeted artifact identifiers.

returns.targetedContracts_: The list of targeted contract addresses.

returns.targetedInterfaces_: The list of targeted address-interface configurations.

returns.targetedSelectors_: The list of targeted selector configurations.

returns.targetedSenders_: The list of targeted sender addresses.

failed().notice: Returns true if any test assertion has failed.

targetSenders().notice: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

test_liquidate_eventFields_capped_bonusI.notice: Capped liquidation — extreme undercollateralization. Setup:   - Price: $150, 1 share, collateral = 225 G$   - Price jumps to $300 -> ratio = 225/300 = 75% -> severely undercollateralized Reward math at $300:   debtValueG  = 300 G$   bonus       = 300 * 10% = 30 G$   reward      = 330 G$  > 225 collateral -> CAP: reward = 225 G$   actualBonus = 225 - 300 = negative -> 0 (floored)   remaining   = 0 Event must emit collateralSeized=225 G$ and bonus=0.

test_liquidate_eventFields_collateralSei.notice: Normal liquidation — no cap. Setup:   - Price: $150, 1 share minted, collateral = 225 G$ (150% ratio)   - Price pumps to $200 -> ratio = 225/200 = 112.5% < 120% -> liquidatable Reward math at $200:   debtValueG  = 200 G$   bonus       = 200 * 10% = 20 G$   reward      = 220 G$  (< 225 collateral -> no cap)   remaining   = 225 - 220 = 5 G$ -> feeSplitter Event must emit collateralSeized=220 G$ and bonus=20 G$ (NOT 225 and 220).

test_liquidate_eventFields_notOldBuggyVa.notice: Verify the pre-fix buggy values are NOT emitted:   - collateralSeized must NOT equal userCollateral (225) when reward is 220   - bonus must NOT equal liquidatorReward (220) when actual bonus is 20
